name: apsal-studio
description: Build traceable APSAL photography projects from multi-image reference analysis through Prompt/Skill packaging, generation, library, and confirmed sharing.

interface.shortDescription: Reference analysis and traceable APSAL photo projects
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns a rights-scoped group of reference images into a traceable root project. Codex analyzes each image and the complete set against the five APSAL layers and thirteen roles, then builds themes, Prompts, QA contracts, shareable Skills, generation Jobs, child-project lineage, a local project library, and platform-specific drafts. Studio remains an optional visual frontend over the same headless Engine and .apsal source of truth.
defaultPrompt: 把这些参考图建立为 APSAL 项目，逐张分析后全自动构建 Prompt 和 Skill。
Create a nine-image live-action photography theme, confirm all thirteen elements, and package every Prompt.
Open this legacy APSAL ZIP, recover its references, and generate the first image directly with Codex.
